title: Format
text: The paint tool copies the format of the entire cell, regardless of the content in the cell.

title: Changing Elements
text: The paint tool will change format such as cell fill color and font only based on the initial cell selected.

title: Font and Fill Color
text: To change formats of a spreadsheet with no limitations, the toolbox at the top of the screen contains the necessary features.

title: Copy and Paste
text: Use keyboard shortcuts or the Copy and Paste actions from the Edit menu to copy and paste the contents of cells.
